═══ LEVEL 9: CHAOS TESTING ═══

── 9.0 Baseline (all services up) ──
  ✅ Baseline: entities list works
  ✅ Baseline: pipeline runs
  ✅ Baseline: intelligence works

── 9.1 Redis failure ──
  ✅ Entities available without Redis
  ✅ Pipeline runs without Redis

── 9.2 Database failure ──
  ✅ DB down returns proper error (not crash)

── 9.3 Bad CSV handling ──
  ✅ Bad CSV returns 200 or 422
  ✅ Invalid csv_type returns 422/400

── 9.4 Invalid payloads ──
  ✅ Empty scenario params don't crash
  ✅ Invalid UUID for risk doesn't crash
  ✅ Invalid entity type filter handled

── 9.5 Rapid concurrent requests ──
  ✅ 20 concurrent GET /entities

═══ LEVEL 9 RESULTS: 12 passed, 0 failed ═══
